Work Related Injuries

The majority of injuries sustained in the workplace consist of sprains and strains that physical therapists are licensed to treat. We provide one-on-one, hands-on care to get you back to work safely and efficiently.

Call (985) 641-5825 Request Appointment

Once a patient is referred to physical

8c83a9643600.plainText: What to Expect at Physical Therapy Once a patient is referred to physical therapy with a work-related injury, the therapist will obtain important information about the injury, the patient's medical history, and pre-existing problems. Getting Back to Work

The ultimate goal of any treatment for work-related injuries is returning the patient t

76cc36fa1dbd.plainText: Getting Back to Work The ultimate goal of any treatment for work-related injuries is returning the patient to their prior level of function at work. The physical therapist will discuss specific job demands with the patient, educate them regarding the healing process, and develop a plan to safely progress back to full duty.
76cc36fa1dbd.originalHtml:
Getting Back to Work

The ultimate goal of any treatment for work-related injuries is returning the patient to their prior level of function at work. The physical therapist will discuss specific job demands with the patient, educate them regarding the healing process, and develop a plan to safely progress back to full duty.

Getting Back to Work

The ultimate goal of any treatment for work-related injuries is returning the patient to their prior level of function at work. The physical therapist will discuss specific job demands with the patient, educate them regarding the healing process, and develop a plan to safely progress back to full duty.

121e1e794106.plainText: When to Seek Help If you've been injured on the job, early physical therapy intervention can help reduce pain, speed recovery, and get you back to work sooner. We accept workers' compensation cases. To see all our Conditions click here .
